Class PhysicalCountController.InventoryRecord

java.lang.Object
com.project.view.manager.PhysicalCountController.InventoryRecord
Enclosing class:
PhysicalCountController
public static class PhysicalCountController.InventoryRecord extends Object
Inner class representing a row in the inventory table. Tracks system quantity, physical count, difference, and reorder level.

  • Property Summary

    Properties
    Type
    Property
    Description
    javafx.beans.property.SimpleIntegerProperty
    difference
    Returns the JavaFX property for the quantity difference.
    javafx.beans.property.SimpleIntegerProperty
    physicalQty
    Returns the JavaFX property for the physical quantity.
    javafx.beans.property.SimpleIntegerProperty
    systemQty
    Returns the JavaFX property for the system quantity.

  • Constructor Details

    • InventoryRecord

      public InventoryRecord(int inventoryItemId, String itemName, String category, int systemQty, int physicalQty, String unit, int reorderLevel)
      Constructs a new InventoryRecord.
      Parameters:
      inventoryItemId - the unique item identifier
      itemName - the display name of the item
      category - the item category
      systemQty - the quantity recorded in the system
      physicalQty - the manually entered physical quantity
      unit - the unit of measurement
      reorderLevel - the threshold for reordering
